segments.text: Our brains are slow with text but
instant with logos. Here are five ways
logos are secretly boosting your
productivity. Pin your favorite sites.
Gmail, YouTube, Figma. Those tiny fab
icons become instant visual shortcut. No
reading required. This was just the
browser. But can you imagine your phone
home screen without the logos? There's
no Instagram camera, no Spotify green
circle. They actually help you to find
your apps in milliseconds. But let's not
just stick to phones. You see McDonald's
golden arches, the Nike sush, and the
Coca-Cola script. While shopping, these
familiar logos cut your decisions from
minutes to seconds. And what happen when
you're lost and can't read anything?
Starbucks logos still mean coffee. Shell
logo still means gas. These universal
symbols just work in any language. But
logos does something even more powerful
to your brain. They don't just identify
the brands. They switch your brain
modes. Zoom means work. Netflix means
chill. Instant context switching.
Subscribe for more.
